query: skincare Mitopure Timeline skin product wrinkles hydration topical

results.title: The Power of Mitopure® Science, Now in Topical Application  - Timeline
results.content:
Timeline’s Firming Serum isn’t just hype; rigorous clinical data back its benefits.  
We conducted an 8-week randomized clinical trial in 36 healthy adults aged 40–65. Those using the Mitopure-containing serum saw statistically significant improvements in skin health, including:  
  
• Reduced appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.†  
• 23% improvement in skin hydration.†  
  
† Based on an 8-week randomized controlled clinical trial of 36 healthy women aged 40 to 65 years. Morning and evening product application.  
  
Consumer feedback mirrored the clinical results:\  
• 90% agreed their skin “felt protected.”  
• 80% said it looked more youthful.  
• 77% noticed a tangible tightening effect. [...] ## Complete the Routine

For best results, integrate the Firming Serum into the full Timeline skincare regimen. It pairs especially well with the Gentle Cleanser and the Resurfacing Exfoliator.  
  
Here’s a step-by-step approach for optimal results:  
  
1. Cleanse with the Gentle Cleanser: A cream-to-mousse formula that lifts impurities without drying the skin.  
  
2. Exfoliate with the Resurfacing Exfoliator: A multi-acid treatment that improves skin texture and imparts an instant glow.  
  
3. Follow up with the Firming Serum: Potent actives deeply penetrate to firm, hydrate and rejuvenate.  
  
4. Moisturize with either the Dewy Cream or Barrier Cream as needed to seal in hydration and maintain skin barrier integrity.

illustration of CoQ10 + Urolithin A

### Authors

Kiran Kumar [...] The Serum, like all of Timeline's skincare products, was developed with sensitive skin in mind. We’ve conducted clinical trials to confirm it’s safe for all skin types, including sensitive, combination, and mature skin. Timeline’s study participants spanned a broad age range and included both women and men, demonstrating the formula’s gentle effectiveness across populations.\\  
  
Though powered by strong actives like Mitopure, and delivers retinoid-like results, the serum does not cause irritation or sensitization over time. It’s truly a high-performance product without the harsh side effects.\\

## Frequently asked questions

Mitopure® is a highly pure, patented form of Urolithin A, a postbiotic molecule that renews cellular health by improving mitochondrial function. In skincare, it promotes more youthful-looking skin in as little as 15 days, reducing the appearance of wrinkle depth and volume, boosting elasticity and firmness, supporting collagen assembly and improving hydration and barrier function.

Cellular energy is the key to longevity, inside and out. As you age, your mitochondria — the energy producers of your cells — become depleted and dysfunctional. [...] serum in design

results.title: Skin Longevity Powered by Mitopure® (Urolithin A) - Timeline
results.content:
## 18

Years of research

In collaboration with the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology de Lausanne (EPFL)

## 25

Human clinical trials

Completed and ongoing gold-standard clinical trials on nutrition and skincare involving over 900 participants

## 500⁺

Studies on Urolithin A

Scientists have extensively explored Urolithin A’s effectiveness on health and patented the bioactive into Mitopure®

## 80

Patents

Our proprietary ingredient Mitopure® is protected under 80 patents

### Proven Benefits

Woman using Mitopure skincare

Mitopure® visibly starts to reduce wrinkle depth and volume after only 2 weeks.

Julie Faitg, PhD

Our skincare offers immediate results, but also delivers gradual, lasting improvements — it’s a true transformation over time.

Julie Faitg, PhD

results.title: Boost Your Skinspan: Top Nutrition Tips for Timeless Skin - Timeline
results.content:
skincare

## Topical Mitopure for Skin Longevity

Urolithin A can be applied topically for targeted skin support. In a gold-standard randomized clinical trial, topical Mitopure (a clinically validated form of Urolithin A) was found to slow intrinsic skin aging and protect against UVB-mediated damage.  
  
Timeline skincare is powered by Mitopure technology to reenergize cells and target visible signs of aging. Our topical range pairs Mitopure with research-driven actives such as niacinamide, red algae extracts, and peptides. Together, these high-performing ingredients fortify the skin barrier, restore hydration, targets skin aging at a foundational level.

Mitopure Barrier Cream

##### Mitopure Barrier Cream

4.7 · 176 reviews

Barrier-preserving restorative moisturizer

Buy now
